name: FigPii
description: All-in-one CRO platform with A/B testing, heatmaps, session recordings and polls/surveys aimed at SMB ecommerce.

seo.title: FigPii — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: FigPii: All-in-one CRO platform with A/B testing, heatmaps, session recordings and polls/surveys aimed at SMB ecommerce.

when_to_use: A/B test landing page variations for ecommerce CRO
Heatmap analysis of product page engagement
Session recordings for checkout funnel debugging
Exit-intent surveys to capture abandonment reasons

pros: A/B testing and replay bundled for one ecommerce price
Heatmaps and polls make CRO hypothesis loops faster
SMB-friendly onboarding without enterprise sales cycle
Lower cost than VWO or Optimizely for similar feature set
cons: Statistical engine is less rigorous than mature A/B platforms
Editor stability issues on complex Shopify themes
Smaller user community means fewer integrations and docs
Reporting dashboards feel basic for multi-test programs
review.verdict: Affordable CRO stack for Shopify SMBs, but serious testing programs will outgrow the stats engine fast.
review.best_for: SMB ecommerce stores running a few simultaneous A/B tests with replay evidence.
review.not_for: Optimization teams needing sequential testing, MVT or enterprise statistics.
